title: LS2 FF406 Matte Black

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Reinforced Polymer (CFRP) Shell with EPS Liner

technical_analysis: The LS2 FF406 utilizes a multi-density EPS liner system designed to optimize impact absorption across different zones of the head. The outer shell is constructed from a carbon fiber reinforced polymer composite, offering a superior strength-to-weight ratio that enhances rider safety without compromising on portability. This material choice allows for precise molding around aerodynamic contours while maintaining structural rigidity during high-impact scenarios.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of style and performance with the LS2 FF406 in a striking matte black finish. Designed for the modern rider who demands both protection and aesthetics, this helmet features aggressive styling cues that command attention on the track or the street. The sleek silhouette not only looks premium but also contributes to reduced wind resistance during high-speed runs.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the LS2 FF406 Matte Black full-face helmet. Featuring ECE 22.06 certification, lightweight carbon fiber construction, and superior ventilation for ultimate riding comfort and safety.
